case_title: YAN, LLC VS. PAWAREE NICHOLS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FELIX YAN, MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF YAN LLC REPRESENTED BY KEVIN YAN AND FELIX YAN MANAGERS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS PAWAREE NICHOLS, PEERAN UCHING, ISSARA SRIPRASOM AND SONGLA SRIPRASOM ARE PRESENT. TESTIMONY IS PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF KEVIN YAN. DEFENDANT TESTIMONY IF PROVIDED BY PAWAREE NICHOLS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KEVIN YAN, MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LLC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YAN, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLS, PAWAREE NG, PEERANUCH SRIPRASOM, ISSARA SRIPRASOM, SONGLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NICHOLS, PAWAREE NG, PEERANUCH SRIPRASOM, ISSARA SRIPRASOM, SONGLA CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDCIE. *SEE ATTACHED MC-025* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
